title: ARB token unlock scheduled 2024-01-16
body: Approximately 92.65M ARB tokens (~2.5% of supply) unlock on January 16, increasing near-term sell pressure on the market.

title: Arbitrum announces major partnership with Robinhood
body: Arbitrum announced today that Robinhood will integrate the Arbitrum L2 for low-cost token transfers, marking a significant expansion of L2 retail adoption.

title: SEC approves spot Bitcoin ETF applications from BlackRock and Fidelity
body: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission approved spot Bitcoin ETF applications from BlackRock and Fidelity on Monday, opening direct institutional access to the asset.

title: Markets quiet ahead of Fed meeting
body: Trading volumes were muted across major risk assets, with traders awaiting the FOMC decision later this week.
